work.name: Aryabhatta Research Institute of Observational Sciences (ARIES)

education.institution: Aryabhatta Research Institute of Observational Sciences (ARIES)

publications.name: Differential Rotation of the Solar Chromosphere: A Century-long Perspective from Kodaikanal Solar Observatory Ca II K Data
publications.summary: It studied the chromospheric differential rotation using Kodaikanal Solar Observatory Ca K data (1907-2007)

publications.name: Ca II K Polar Network Index of the Sun: A Proxy for Historical Polar Magnetic Field
publications.summary: Introduces Ca II K polar network index as a historical proxy for solar polar magnetic field.

publications.name: Machine Learning-based Identification of the Solar Disk and Plages in Kodaikanal Solar Observatory Historical Suncharts
publications.summary: ML pipeline for solar disk and plage detection using long-baseline KSO historical suncharts.

publications.name: Differential Rotation of the Solar Chromosphere using multidecadal Ca II K Spectroheliograms
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the International Astronomical Union
publications.summary: Conference paper on multi-decadal chromospheric differential rotation from Ca II K observations.
